input:
Embedding cost: $0.13 per million tokens at OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small.

At our current corpus growth rate (~10k fragments/month), monthly embedding spend is under $5.

The partial index on (deleted_at IS NULL AND embedding IS NULL) keeps the retry scan O(unembedded) regardless of corpus size.
notes: Numeric facts. Each number anchors its own fragment — splitting must preserve the figure with its claim.
